headline: Middle-income homebuyers have $30,000 more buying power than a year ago, research finds. It's still not enough
summary: While the amount that a median-income household can afford is higher than it was a year ago, it is still below the median price for a single-family home.

headline: Real Estate Giant CoStar Group Is Under Activist Pressure. Insiders Are Buying Stock.
summary: Commercial real-estate giant  CoStar Group  is embroiled in a battle with two activist investors.  The purchase brought her direct holdings to 4,157 shares, which were valued at $197,873 based on Wednesday’s closing price of $47.60.  The highest-ranking executive to buy company stock was CEO and Founder Andy Florance, who purchased 55,720 shares for $44.52 apiece on Feb. 27.

headline: CoStar Activist Clash Puts Homes.com Spending And Buyback In Focus
summary: CoStar Group, NasdaqGS:CSGP, is under pressure from activist hedge funds questioning its push into residential real estate and the Homes.com platform. Management has responded with insider share purchases, a board approved share repurchase plan, and cuts to Homes.com spending. These moves signal a potential shift in how CoStar allocates capital between its core business and newer residential efforts. For you as an investor, this is all landing on a stock that closed at $48.38 and carries a...
